name: codex-max
description: A VS Code workspace tab with a compact multi-chat Codex board.

codexMax.codexExecutable.description: Codex CLI executable used by chat cards.

codexMax.defaultSandbox.description: Sandbox mode used when a new Codex thread starts.

codexMax.model.description: Optional Codex model override passed to the CLI.

codexMax.maxVisibleChats.description: Soft limit for chats shown on one board before the UI warns you.

codexMax.chatsPerRow.description: Default number of chat cards per horizontal row in the Codex Max board.

codexMax.chatsPerColumn.description: Default number of chat card rows visible vertically in the Codex Max board.

scripts.check: node --check extension.js && node --check lib/platform.js && node --check lib/file-utils.js && node --check lib/codex-cli.js && node --check lib/attachments.js && node --check lib/codex-events.js && node --check lib/whisper-utils.js && node --check lib/whisper-manager.js && node --check lib/whisper-catalog.js && node --check lib/state-store.js && node --check lib/codex-runner.js && node --check webview/html.js && node --check webview/bootstrap.js && node --check webview/utils.js && node --check webview/state-model.js && node --check webview/workspace-controller.js && node --check webview/chat-store.js && node --check webview/attachments.js && node --check webview/board-metrics.js && node --check webview/form-controls.js && node --check webview/dropdown-menus.js && node --check webview/markdown.js && node --check webview/image-preview.js && node --check webview/scroll-manager.js && node --check webview/voice.js && node --check webview/chat-render.js && node --check webview/toolbar-controller.js && node --check webview/chat-card-controller.js && node --check webview/chat-actions.js && node --check webview/chat-info.js && node --check webview/board-settings.js && node --check webview/board-renderer.js && node --check webview/message-router.js && node --check webview/keyboard-controller.js && node --check webview/main.js && node scripts/check-codex-runner.js && node scripts/check-board-metrics.js
scripts.install:local: npm run package && node -e "const cp=require('child_process');const v=require('./package.json').version;cp.execSync('code --install-extension codex-max-'+v+'.vsix --force',{stdio:'inherit'});"
